title: Implement PhonePe integration, live total calculation, delivery date display, and SMS notifications

requirements.text: Fix the PhonePe QR code click handler on the OrderForm page to correctly open the PhonePe mobile application using the proper deep link URL format (phonepe://) that works on mobile devices

quotes: PhonePe QR Integration - Clicking the QR code will open the PhonePe app directly on mobile devices for seamless payment

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the QR code image on OrderForm opens the PhonePe app on mobile devices
The deep link uses the correct phonepe:// URL scheme
Falls back gracefully if PhonePe app is not installed

requirements.text: Add real-time total amount calculation on the OrderForm page that dynamically multiplies the selected product price (Milk: ₹60/Litre, Paneer: ₹400/Kg, Ghee: ₹1500/Kg) by the entered quantity value and displays the calculated total amount prominently above the submit button

quotes: Live Total Calculation - As customers enter quantity, the app instantly shows the total amount (Quantity × Rate)

acceptanceCriteria: Total amount updates in real-time as quantity changes
Calculation uses correct product rates: Milk ₹60/L, Paneer ₹400/Kg, Ghee ₹1500/Kg
Total amount is displayed prominently with rupee symbol formatting
Total appears before the WhatsApp submit button

requirements.text: Display the delivery date field on the DeliverySchedule page for each order, showing when that specific order is scheduled for delivery with proper date formatting

quotes: Delivery Date Display - The delivery schedule will show exactly when each order is set for delivery

acceptanceCriteria: Delivery date is visible for each order in the delivery schedule
Date is formatted in a user-friendly way
Handles cases where delivery date may not be set

requirements.text: Implement SMS notification functionality that automatically sends an order confirmation message to the customer's mobile phone number when an order is successfully placed through the OrderForm

quotes: SMS Notifications - Customers automatically receive order confirmation messages on their mobile numbers when orders are placed

acceptanceCriteria: SMS is sent to the customer's phone number after order placement
SMS sending does not block the order submission flow

constraints: Do not modify immutable frontend paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui
Use existing WhatsApp integration pattern for order submission
Preserve existing order history and delivery schedule functionality
Keep warm color scheme and avoid blue/purple as per design guidelines
nonGoals: Altering the QR code image itself
Adding new products beyond Milk, Paneer, and Ghee
